name: Justo Betancourt
abstract: Justo Betancourt (born December 6, 1940) is a Cuban singer famous for his interpretation of "Pa' bravo yo". He was born in Matanzas, Cuba, but has lived a significant amount of time in Puerto Rico.

concerts.label: Midnight Performance: Hommy - A Latin Opera

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Palmieri
about_quotes.evidence: And we’re friends. He worked with me like ten days when his mind was on vacation
about_quotes.doc_title: Eddie Palmieri — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
